\tzpentry{ID4399}{Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4399 introduces Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Hhat_{\mathrm{ph}} = \sum_{q} \hbar \omega(q) \Bigl(b_q^\dagger b_q + \tfrac{1}{2} \Bigr), \]
